meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Manish Kapur: Assessing the Quality of AI Generated Code
meta.description:
This session by Manish Kapur, Sr. Director, Product and Solutions at Sonar, revealed Sonar's new research into the unique coding "personalities" and flaws of leading LLMs, based on their experience analyzing over 300 billion lines of code daily. 

Kapur shared these key findings and showed how SonarQube enables teams to adopt AI coding tools with confidence, turning a critical business challenge into a competitive advantage.

-----------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
